extensions.author: RobDevice
extensions.description: Driver extension for the VSDinside/HOTSPOTEK N4.
extensions.name: VSDinside N4 Driver
extensions.release_notes: Replaces page visuals as one prepared frame, clears unassigned controls reliably, and uses the device-wide display clear command.
extensions.review_notes: Packaged as a normal driver extension and intended to be installed through the Extensions tab.

extensions.author: RobDevice
extensions.description: MSFS 2020 SimVars and Key Events through SimConnect.
extensions.name: MSFS SimConnect
extensions.release_notes: Uses pressure-corrected indicated altitude for the current value in the Altitude dual readout, matching the PFD altimeter.
extensions.review_notes: Uses standard SimConnect only. Aircraft-specific L:Vars and H: events remain out of scope; VNAV can use a user-selected current-aircraft Input Event.
